mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS changes exceeds 0.05 in magnitude with positive sign over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate above 4.0% signals labor market deterioration and impending recession, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between real GDP growth and real savings indicates weakening consumer demand relative to income, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS yields Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production signals supply-side contraction and reduced economic activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.10) during periods of declining INDPRO.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low policy rates creates a negative real interest rate environment that initially boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields negative 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects strong economic expansion and rising corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS changes remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in housing starts below 1.4 million units signals a sharp contraction in construction demand and broader economic slowdown, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 20-day returns are positive in > 55% of instances when HOUST falls below 1400.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous weakness in industrial production and rising unemployment indicates a broad-based economic contraction, amplifying negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between INDPRO and UNRATE fails to produce significant predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) over any 2-year rolling window.
